subject: Weekly digest: falcon track in San Francisco | Nikola Tesla | Q1 review | INIT-0333
body: Here is a progress summary for the falcon plan in San Francisco. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Nikola Tesla is cited as a case study for risk management in this domain. Reference initiative INIT-0333. A revised timeline will be circulated after feedback is collected. Tracking tags: wine, coffee.
